title: FATHIYA Data Gathering Kit
summary: Structured data gathering kit defining intake templates, collection protocols, and classification schemas for FATHIYA source material processing.
key_principles: Every source enters through a structured intake template with provenance metadata.
Collection protocols define what to capture, how to classify, and where to route.
Source material is archived before processing — raw input is never discarded.
Classification drives routing: each source maps to a domain, queue, and intended artifact class.
boundary: Data gathering templates and protocols only. Does not access external data sources.
